llmResponse.agenda_changes: No agenda changes announced. President Wells asked "do we have any changes to the agenda?" and proceeded directly to motion for approval without identifying any modifications.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: All right, let's move on to the consent Items. There are 10 of them and we're going to approve them all in one vote. I move we approve the consent item.
